title: rubus × recognitiformis
intro: Rubus × recognitiformis, also known as the hybrid raspberry or thimbleberry, is a plant species that belongs to the Rosaceae family and is a cross between Rubus idaeus and Rubus arcticus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help protect against cell damage, reduce inflammation, and prevent infections. The health benefits of Rubus × recognitiformis include supporting cardiovascular health, reducing the risk of certain cancers, and providing relief from symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. Rubus × recognitiformis can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed as a natural remedy for various health issues.
